name: Installation Type Classifier
description: Determine whether an installation is supervised or unsupervised per E1.46

start.question: Is a trained operator continuously present during laser operation?

has_operator_control.question: Can the operator immediately terminate laser emission if needed?

has_immediate_termination.question: Is the operator positioned to monitor all laser effects and audience areas?

supervised.name: Supervised Installation
supervised.description: Continuous operator monitoring with immediate control
examples: Live concert with operator at console
Stage production with dedicated laser operator

unsupervised.name: Unsupervised Installation
unsupervised.description: Automated or scheduled operation without continuous monitoring

partially_supervised.name: Partially Supervised
partially_supervised.note: Treat as unsupervised or provide additional safety measures
partially_supervised.recommendation: Install additional e-stop operators for blind spots
